name: First House
meaning: The First House governs your outer personality, physical appearance, and the mask you present to the world. Planets here are prominently visible in your life expression.

name: Second House
meaning: The Second House rules your personal finances, possessions, and the values that guide your material choices. It shows how you earn and what you truly value beyond money.

name: Third House
meaning: The Third House governs how you think, speak, and process immediate experiences. It rules siblings, local travel, and the exchange of information in your daily life.

name: Fourth House
meaning: The Fourth House represents your home, family of origin, ancestral patterns, and the private emotional foundation that supports your outer life.

name: Fifth House
meaning: The Fifth House is the house of joy — creative expression, romance, children, play, and all forms of pleasurable self-expression. It shows how you love and create.

name: Sixth House
meaning: The Sixth House governs your daily routines, health practices, work environment, and attitude toward service. It shows how you maintain your body and contribute to ordinary life.

name: Seventh House
meaning: The Seventh House is the primary house of partnership — marriage, committed relationships, and significant one-on-one connections. It also shows what qualities you project onto others.

name: Eighth House
meaning: The Eighth House governs shared resources, sexuality, death, and profound transformation. It rules what is hidden beneath the surface — power, inheritance, and the process of deep change.

name: Ninth House
meaning: The Ninth House rules higher education, philosophy, long-distance travel, and spiritual seeking. It represents your quest for meaning and the belief systems that shape your worldview.

name: Tenth House
meaning: The Tenth House is the highest point of the chart, governing career, public reputation, authority, and your contribution to society. It shows the mountain you are climbing.

name: Eleventh House
meaning: The Eleventh House governs friendships, social groups, collective ideals, and your vision for the future. It shows your relationship to community and your hopes and dreams.

name: Twelfth House
meaning: The Twelfth House rules the unconscious, spiritual retreat, hidden enemies, and undoing. It is the house of what is hidden from the self, and contains both your greatest vulnerabilities and your deepest spiritual gifts.
